_about: Replay cassette of DataHub GMS OpenAPI v3 versioned-aspect responses (GET /openapi/v3/entity/dataset/{urn}/{aspect}?systemMetadata=true&version=N). Each `response` is exactly the JSON body the live client's readAspectVersions() parses. Replaying these through the pinned mappers proves the version-history recovery works against the REAL response shape without a running instance.

_provenance.shape_source: The systemMetadata envelope { value, systemMetadata: { properties, version, lastObserved, lastRunId, runId } } and the verbatim globalTags entry below are taken from the published DataHub OpenAPI guide (docs.datahub.com/docs/api/openapi/openapi-usage-guide). This is REAL-SHAPE (pinned from DataHub's own docs), not our interpretation of source code.
_provenance.pending_real_capture: A capture from a running GMS on a cloud VM is USER-GATED (no live instance in CI). Replace the ownership/schema history entries below with a real captured batch when the demo VM is stood up; the docs-verbatim globalTags entry already anchors the envelope shape.

entries._note: VERBATIM from docs.datahub.com OpenAPI guide — anchors the { value, systemMetadata } envelope + the systemMetadata field names/types.
ownership version 1 — written by the Snowflake connector ingestion run.
ownership version 2 — the dbt manifest ingestion run overwrote the owner. Latest-write-wins hides this on the current view; the version history recovers it.
